generator.note: The active image_generate tool reports FAL.ai/FLUX and exposes no per-call model selector. The mismatch is recorded rather than misrepresented. One rejected hero generation containing pseudo-labels and a device logo was kept out of production.

optimization.quality: 82 for the original editorial set; 84 for the commerce additions
